title: Brevo vs SendGrid (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs SendGrid: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and SendGrid comes down to your specific use case. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while SendGrid targets developers and high-volume senders.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while SendGrid is stronger for developers and high-volume senders.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or SendGrid?
faq.a: SendGrid starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from SendGrid to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
